cases.prompt: 이거 배포하자, PR 만들고 push 해줘

assertions.text: Detects and merges the base branch, then runs tests before shipping.
Bumps VERSION and updates CHANGELOG before committing.
Commits, pushes, and creates a PR rather than pushing to main directly.

cases.prompt: The feature is ready, ship it and create a PR.

assertions.text: Reviews the diff as part of the ship workflow.
Runs the full ship flow: tests, VERSION bump, CHANGELOG update, commit, push, PR creation.
